productDisplayName: Vans Unisex Authentic Black & Pink Shoes
description: vans Authentic Lo Pro coaxes you from the staple regular casual shoes into something more exciting. The colour pop styling on the upper suits the high-fashion obsession with colour blocking, giving your off-duty ensembles a fresh new vibe. Wear these sockless with any casual outfit. UpperCanvas uppersVanslite super-soft molded and contoured EVA sandal sock liner Central lacing systemLogo flag on midfootPadded tongue and collar for instep comfortCut low at the ankle for styleMidsolePU midsole for better shock absorptionOutsoleWaffle sole texture on the flexible vulcanized gum rubber outsoleshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
